package rulecoverage

func PositiveUrlRedirectWithoutValidation() string {
    ruleID := "url_redirect_without_validation"
    family := "security"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`http.Redirect(w, r, r.FormValue(\"redirect_url\"), 302)` or `c.Redirect(302, c.Query(\"url\"))` without URL validation"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
